name: io.github.Wangggym/quarry
description: Safety-railed database access for agents: Postgres, MySQL, Redis. Read-only by default.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: resolve the qy entry point from the quarry-db package

packageArguments.description: serve the MCP face over stdio

packageArguments.name: --workspace
packageArguments.description: path to a Quarry workspace directory (connections.toml + queries/)
